title: Job Openings at WTS Energy
content:
WTS Energy provides recruitment and manpower services for the global oil and gas and energy industries. We supply engineers and consultants to our clients' projects and operations, and perform employment outsourcing services such as workforce management in oil and gas regions around the world. WTS Energy operates globally with offices in 14 countries and is operational in over 50 countries.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Junior Maintenance Technician – Well Head

Job Location: Nigeria
Line Manager: PSUP and/or SMTE when on-board FPSO, CNR Supervisor when working on the Wellheads

Job Summary
     

            
    




	The responsibilities include the main General and Special responsibilities listed below. In addition, the OIM or any superior may assign any other tasks to be performed.


Key Responsibilties
General Responsibilities:


	To assist Process Supervisor with all operations and maintenance related to WHT Platforms.
	To carry out operations and maintenance duties safely and professionally in accordance to Yinson Production HSEQ system.
	Ensure that the platforms are operating in a safe condition and report any irregularities.
	Planning and supervising of work performed by WHT Maintenance men.
	Cooperate with WHT Electrician
	Keeps close cooperation with CNR (client) technical personnel


Special Responsibilities:


	Perform maintenance of platforms, especially :
	
		Handling of AMOS computer system/part of system related to WHT
		Stock in/out inventory
		Mechanical checks and repair of machinery incl. Cranes
		Chemical skid
		Nitrogen system
		Pigging stations
		AC systems
		HP and LP pumps
		Cranes
	
	
	Take samples for lab analysis.
	Operating of cranes and derricks. At present only main crane on platform CSP-C.
	Perform pig launching/receiving operation.
	Perform safely chemical transfers and adjustment of chemicals flow rates if necessary.
	Executes the maintenance and operations tasks given by PSUP
	Perform the preparation, isolation & de-isolation of equipment during maintenance interventions.
	Assist/or perform the shutdown and start-up of platforms equipment and relevant utilities.
	Inspect the safety equipment and reports any anomaly.
	Executes the required work according to issued work permits.
	Assists any member of the team in cases of necessity.
	Ensure the work is performed in a safe condition and report hazardous conditions without delay to the responsible WHT CNR Supervisor.
	Keep WHT team and their work environment safe and clean.
	Familiar with the safety shut-down system and know the necessary actions to be taken in the event of alarms / shut-down situations i.e. PSD, ESD, fire and gas alarm.
	Familiar with the PTW System
	To be fully familiar with regulations and work procedures applicable to the task to be executed.
	Maintaining good housekeeping


Certificates and Training:


	Officer in Charge of an engineering watch certificate, STCW95 – Ref. III/1
	For other certificates and training, see Company Training Matrix, Unit Specific Training Matrix and CBT Matrix


Qualifications and Experience


	Have completed combined workshop skills training and an approved seagoing service of not less than 12 months as part of an approved training programme which includes on-board training that meets the requirement of section A-III/1 of the STCW Code and is documented in an approved training record book, or otherwise have completed combined workshop skills training and an approved seagoing service of not less than 36 months of which not less than 30 months shall be seagoing service in the engine department;
	Have performed, during the required seagoing service, engine room watch-keeping duties under the supervision of the chief engineer or a qualified engineer officer for a period of not less than 6 months.
	Have completed approved education and training and meet the standards of competence specified in section A-III/1 of the STCW code and
	Meet the standard of competence specified in section A-VI/1 paragraph 2, section A-VI/2 paragraphs 1 to 4, section A-VI/3 paragraphs 1 to 4 and section A-VI/4 paragraphs 1 to 3 of the STCW Code
	Very good English written and spoken.


Click here to apply online

 

2.) Structural / Piping Supervisor

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers

Job Summary


	Participate in the review of both Structural and piping deliverables.
	Review CTR preparedness for site mobilization by ensuring that work plan is robust and suited for the task.
	Ensure that construction deliverables comply with COMPANY specifications.
	To coordinate interface with construction teams to ensure a smooth construction work.
	To support the project engineer to prepare scope of work for any additional work.
	To actively participate in all Project Technical meetings.
	Follow up of contractor’s activities and ensure compliance with Project specifications.
	Reports to Package Manager on progress of Structural/piping activities


Key Responsibilties


	Follow-up Engineer’s activities related to structures design studies and ensure compliance with General specifications and with the requirements of the project documentation.
	Liaise with contractor’s design staff as and when required to ensure efficient and timely resolution of all issues identified during site work.
	Monitor construction, outfitting activities at the fabrication yard and during site installation and construction, hook-up and commissioning.
	Liaise with other Company staff at site and at other locations for coordination of interface design and other activities
	Manage technical evaluation of the bids and prepare technical recommendation to Package Manager.
	Follow-up procurement, construction, expediting, and assist in pre-commissioning related activities.
	Review and comment on CONTRACTOR documents within ten working days.
	Anticipate problems in his/her discipline and inform Package Manager.
	Highlight and report any deficiencies or changes to the Contractual scope of the basis of design.
	Review and analyze planning updates including critical path for discipline related activities; review and approve progress for discipline related activities, and coordinate with package Manager.
	Ensure that CONTRACTOR resources and organization are adequate and competent for achieving the discipline engineering and procurement works.
	Prepare responses to all technical requests from CONTRACTOR and Project with the aim to add value by minimizing costs without sacrificing safety or the level of quality. This includes offering solutions and informing the Package Manager.
	Provide detailed assistance to COMPANY Package Manager on derogations, exemption, modification requests.
	Undertake technical evaluation of Change Order Requests for the parts related to the discipline.
	To participate in all audit activities at the CONTRACTOR base and site.
	Ensure close interface with Engineering and Construction contractor, participate and propose solution through
	Engineering, Procurement Construction, Modification and commissioning to ensure delivery of Project.
	Mark-up drawings on site for purposes of preparing As-built drawings.


Professional Qualifications


	Qualification: Bachelor’s Degree (Structural or Mechanical Engineering) equivalent or more.
	Professional Experience (number of years): 10
	Experience within project: (number of years): 10
	Onshore Greenfield and Brown field Project engineering and design experience
	Onshore Construction works supervision.
	Knowledge and application of systems and methods for structural materials selection and calculations.
	Skillful in verifying and validating third party structural design calculations.


Click here to apply online

 

 

3.) Sales Specialist

Job Location: Lagos

Job Objective


	An indigenous company that provides technology-driven solutions that enhance safety and operational resilience across Nigeria’s high-impact industries.
	Responsible for sales revenue growth, customer acquisition, Customer satisfaction and customer relationship management for the company by aiding sales activities.


Job Responsibilities 
Job Duties/ Responsibilities/Accountabilities:
Main tasks will include but are not limited to the following:


	Develop business and marketing plans in coordination with BD Manager to achieverevenue goals
	Participate in industry forums, client discussions, and conferences as a representative of the organization
	Interface with customers via phone and e-mail to identify areas of opportunity and provide customers with marketing collateral to further develop their interest.
	Maintain all relevant contact information and record all correspondence for appropriate actions in CRM tools (Salesforce, Action Plans)
	Perform market research to identify new opportunities and engage team members to establish strategies for pursuing those new opportunities from initiation to completion
	Prepare presentation slides and conduct sales presentations to client (internal and external)
	Determine cross-selling opportunities of the company’s products and solutions to internal, existing and potential customers
	Develop and maintain strong customer relationships in order to generate high volume of prospective clients
	Work with Training team to ensure 95% customer satisfaction.
	Respond to client queries regarding the company’s products and services in a timely fashion
	Supply management with reports on customer needs, challenges, interests, competitive activities, and potential for new products and services
	Develop and review business proposals for new and existing customers
	Participate in documentation processes, bid management and review of contracts from clients
	Assist in preparation of budget for the department and management meetings
	Ensure all documentation with regards the company’s are always updated.


Qualifications  / Experience Required


	Possess a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science or Engineering degree in or related field from an accredited university.
	5-10 years of post NYSC experience in business development/sales role.
	Possession of additional professional qualifications will be an advantage
	Previous experience in an IT firm entrenched in Sales of IT software will be a major plus


Key Competencies Requirements
Functional / Technical:


	Good understanding of business and product development cycle, leading practices, techniques and methodologies
	Market/competitive analysis and research techniques
	Project Management
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Top-notch analytical skills — Must have an eye for detail!
	The ability to travel to meet clients, attend conferences and
	research new markets as needed.


Behavioural:


	Helpful and personable attitude with evident desire to assist all team members to perform effectively
	Team player that goes beyond job requirement in solving problems and challenges
	Ability to work under pressure and still meet up with given deadlines
	Good relationship building, networking and marketing skills
	Manage and prioritise time
	Plan, Organize and schedule work
	Possess effective communication skills to interact with diverse groups of people both in writing and in speaking without getting misunderstood
	Analytical and be able to transfer complex information from several points of view and communicate effectively.


Click here to apply online    

    

        Click here to Apply

Legal Secretary / Human Resource Officer Job at KannyVic Enterprise Consult




        
    

        
        KannyVic Enterprise Consult - Our client, a reputable and growing organization, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Legal Secretary / Human Resource Officer 
Job Location: Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	A reputable and growing organization is seeking to recruit a competent, discreet, and highly organized *Legal Secretary / Human Resource Officer* to support its legal, administrative, and human resource functions.
	The ideal candidate must be detail-oriented, trustworthy, professional, and capable of handling confidential documents, staff records, legal correspondence, contracts, meetings, recruitment matters, and general office administration.
	The Legal Secretary / Human Resource Officer will provide secretarial and administrative support on legal matters while also coordinating human resource duties such as recruitment, staff documentation, employee records, attendance monitoring, onboarding, policy compliance, and workplace discipline.
	The role requires someone with strong communication skills, good knowledge of office administration, basic legal documentation, HR procedures, and the ability to manage sensitive information with complete confidentiality.


Key Responsibilities
The successful candidate will be responsible for:


	Preparing, typing, formatting, and filing legal documents, letters, agreements, contracts, minutes, and official correspondence.
	Maintaining legal files, employee files, company documents, and confidential records.
	Supporting management in recruitment, onboarding, staff documentation, and HR administration.
	Keeping staff attendance, leave, disciplinary, and performance records.
	Drafting employment letters, warning letters, memos, notices, and internal communications.
	Liaising with external lawyers, consultants, government agencies, and other official bodies where required.
	Coordinating meetings, appointments, interviews, and management schedules.
	Ensuring proper documentation of company assets, staff records, contracts, and official files.
	Supporting management with compliance, workplace policies, and employee relations.
	Performing other administrative duties as may be assigned.


Key Requirements
Applicants must possess:


	A minimum of OND, HND, Bachelor’s Degree, or equivalent qualification* in Law, Secretarial Studies, Business Administration, Human Resource Management, Public Administration, or any related field.
	Prior experience as a Legal Secretary, Administrative Officer, HR Assistant, HR Officer, Personal Assistant, or Office Secretary.
	Good knowledge of legal documentation, contracts, filing systems, staff records, and office procedures.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong computer skills, especially Microsoft Word, Excel, email management, and document formatting.
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive company and staff information.
	Good organizational, time management, and record-keeping skills.
	Ability to multitask and work with minimal supervision.
	Good interpersonal skills and professional appearance.
	Knowledge of Nigerian labour practices will be an added advantage.


Required Skills:


	Legal documentation and secretarial skills
	Human resource administration
	Confidentiality and discretion
	Strong typing and document formatting ability
	Filing and record management
	Professional communication
	Staff coordination and employee relations
	Attention to detail
	Time management
	Problem-solving ability.


Salary
Very competitive.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Renmoney
content:
Renmoney - We are a passionate team determined to challenge the status quo and make financial inclusion count for the millions of under-banked individuals and small business owners in Nigeria. We provide loans, savings, and fixed deposit solutions to our customers. Our vision is to be the most convenient lending company, delivering outstanding service experiences.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Tax Intern

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-Time

What You Will Do 
     

            
    




	Assist in the preparation and filing of tax returns, including VAT, WHT, CIT, PAYE, and other statutory obligations. 
	Support tax computations and reconciliation of tax accounts. 
	Maintain accurate and organized documentation of tax records and correspondence. 
	Assist in responding to tax queries and requests from regulatory authorities such as the NRS and State tax agencies. 
	Participate in tax audits and investigations under the guidance of senior team members. 
	Monitor tax deadlines and support timely compliance with statutory requirements. 
	Assist in preparing tax schedules, reports, and supporting documentation. 
	Conduct research on Nigerian tax laws, regulations, and emerging developments. 
	Provide administrative and operational support to the tax team as required. 
	Maintain high levels of accuracy and confidentiality in handling tax-related information. 


What You Bring 
Educational Qualification :


	Recent graduate with a Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or a related discipline. 
	Must have successfully completed the National Youth Service Corps (NYSC) programme. 
	Strong academic record. 


Experience:


	Previous internship experience or coursework in taxation, accounting, finance, or related areas is an added advantage. 
	Basic knowledge of Nigerian tax laws and regulations is beneficial. 


Professional Competencies:


	Basic understanding of taxation and the Nigerian tax system. 
	Tax computation and reconciliation. 
	Documentation and record management. 
	Research and analytical skills. 
	Microsoft Office proficiency (Excel, Word, PowerPoint). 
	Communication skills. 
	Attention to detail and accuracy. 
	Integrity and confidentiality. 


This Role Is Ideal For You If: 


	You are analytical and enjoy working with numbers and financial information. 
	You are detail-oriented and committed to accuracy. 
	You are eager to build a career in taxation and regulatory compliance. 
	You enjoy research and problem-solving. 
	You can work independently while collaborating effectively within a team. 
	You are able to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines. 


You May Not Enjoy This Role If: 


	You dislike working with figures, data, or detailed documentation. 
	You prefer highly unstructured work environments. 
	You struggle with accuracy and attention to detail. 
	You are uncomfortable with regulatory requirements and compliance processes. 
	You dislike repetitive tasks or working within established procedures. 


Click here to apply online

 

 

2.) Verification Analyst

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time

Description
The position


	The Verification Officer role involves reviewing and evaluating address verification pictures submitted by sales agents and field verification agents for customers applying for loans, ensuring all submissions meet the company’s verification and compliance standards. 


We are the place for you, if


	You’re excited about technology and the future, and you’re looking for a place to learn and grow.
	You care a lot about detail and pride yourself in impeccable execution. You are adept at identifying, assessing, mitigating, monitoring and reporting risks, and ensuring controls are working effectively.
	You are ready to work extremely hard, at a fast pace, to achieve audacious goals. You love to speak up, ask questions, and are comfortable challenging anyone or any idea.


Key Responsibilities


	Review and analyze address verification pictures and reports submitted by sales agents and verification agents.
	Approve or decline verification submissions based on company verification criteria.
	Review verification reports on third-party vendor platforms used by the company.
	Liaise with verification agents and provide them with relevant customer details for verification visits.
	Ensure verification submissions meet GPS, landmark, and image quality requirements.
	Identify inconsistencies or suspicious information and escalate when necessary.
	Ensure verifications are completed within the required turnaround time (TAT).


Requirements


	Minimum of 2 years of experience in field verification, dispatch riding, or a similar role.
	Experience in field verification, operations, or related admin/fintech role
	Strong attention to detail and ability to spot errors or inconsistencies in reports/images
	Ability to review verification photos against set standards (GPS, landmarks, image quality)
	Basic understanding of loan/credit verification processes
	Good communication skills to liaise with field/sales agents
	Ability to use verification tools, dashboards, and mobile/GPS applications
	Strong judgment to identify suspicious information and escalate when needed
	Ability to work within strict turnaround time (TAT) deadlines.


Benefits
What’s in it for you:


	You’ll receive competitive compensation and work with amazing people.
	You’ll work in a beautiful environment with a flat structure and solve complex, real-world challenges.


Click here to apply online

 

 

3.) Internal Control Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time

The Role


	The Internal Control Unit is seeking to strengthen the internal control environment across the business through the recruitment of an Internal Control Officer.
	The role will focus on reviewing financial transactions, procurement activities, reconciliations, and other operational processes in line with the COSO framework to ensure operational efficiency, compliance, and risk mitigation.


What You Will Do


	Monitor controls around loan approvals, interest calculations, reconciliations, journal entries, and ledger postings.
	Conduct daily reviews of operational transactions including account openings, loans, payments, deposits, and expenses.
	Review commission and incentive computations.
	Track control exceptions and follow up with process owners on remediation actions across various business areas.
	Monitor compliancae with internal policies and relevant regulatory requirements.


What You Bring
Experience & Qualifications:


	At least 2 years of post-NYSC experience.
	Relevant background in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.


Skills & Competencies:


	Knowledge of financial operations, reconciliations, and transaction review processes.
	Understanding of loan processes, accounting entries, and operational risk management.
	Good analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.
	Ability to identify control gaps and recommend corrective actions.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and reporting tools.
	Good communication and stakeholder management skills.
	Ability to work independently and follow up on remediation actions.
	Basic knowledge of regulatory requirements and compliance standards within the financial services industry.


This Role Is Ideal For You If:


	You enjoy reviewing transactions and identifying control weaknesses.
	You have a keen eye for detail and can spot inconsistencies quickly.
	You are analytical and enjoy investigating issues to determine root causes.
	You are proactive in driving remediation and process improvements.
	You can work independently while collaborating effectively with stakeholders across the business.


You May Not Enjoy This Role If:


	You prefer highly repetitive work with little analysis.
	You struggle with following up on issues until resolution.
	You are uncomfortable working with large volumes of financial and operational data.
	You find it challenging to enforce compliance requirements and internal controls.


What's In It For You


	Opportunity to strengthen your expertise in internal controls, risk management, and operational reviews within a fast-growing financial institution.
	Exposure to critical business processes, financial operations, and regulatory compliance frameworks.
	Opportunity to work closely with cross-functional teams and contribute to strengthening the Bank's control environment.
	Competitive compensation and benefits package.
	Career growth opportunities within a dynamic and technology-driven organisation.


Click here to apply online    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Wordpress Developer Job at the Vault Recruitment (TVR)
content:
The Vault Recruitment (TVR) is a fast growing recruitment firm specializing in connecting top talent with SME's and Startup organizations. Our team of experienced recruiters understands the unique needs and challenges of the modern job market and uses our extensive network and industry knowledge to find the best candidates for our clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Wordpress Developer

Vacancy Code: KBD003
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos (Remote)

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking a skilled and creative WordPress Developer to design, develop, and maintain responsive websites using WordPress.
	The ideal candidate should have strong technical knowledge, attention to detail, and the ability to create functional and visually appealing websites that align with business goals.


Key Responsibilities


	Design, develop, and maintain WordPress websites.
	Customize WordPress themes and plugins based on project requirements.
	Ensure websites are responsive, user-friendly, and optimized for performance.
	Troubleshoot website issues and implement fixes promptly.
	Manage website updates, backups, and security measures.
	Optimize websites for SEO and speed performance.
	Collaborate with designers, content creators, and other team members to execute projects effectively.
	Integrate third-party tools, APIs, and plugins where necessary.


Requirements


	Proven experience as a WordPress Developer.
	Strong knowledge of WordPress CMS, themes, and plugins.
	Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP.
	Experience with Elementor or other page builders.
	Basic understanding of SEO principles and website optimization.
	Ability to troubleshoot and solve technical issues independently.
	Good communication and time management skills.
	Ability to work remotely and meet deadlines.


Salary
N100,000 monthly.

Note: Shortlisted applicants will be required to share their screen during the interview and should be prepared to provide links to any relevant portfolio(s) for discussion and assessment.
